title: Octatrack Tutorial #1 - Basics
creator: Cuckoo
description: Cuckoo's first Octatrack tutorial covering basic navigation, hardware overview, and first steps with the machine.
notes: Foundational tutorial by one of the most respected Octatrack educators. MK1-focused but core concepts apply to MK2.

title: Octatrack Tutorial #2 - Easy Sampling
creator: Cuckoo
description: Cuckoo demonstrates easy sampling for total beginners with the PO-12 and vinyl. Clear explanation of Flex machines and Audio Editor basics.
notes: Excellent entry point for sampling. Very beginner-friendly, shows real-world workflow with external audio sources.

title: Octatrack Arranger - Song Mode Tutorial
creator: Cuckoo
description: How to use Octatrack's Arranger mode (song mode) to sequence patterns, build complete songs, and perform live set changes.
notes: Covers song structure and live performance workflow. Shows how to move beyond single patterns.

title: Octatrack Performance Mixer 3.0 - Deep Dive
creator: EZBOT
description: EZBOT's in-depth breakdown of the Performance Mixer 3.0 template with live musical examples and modulation techniques.
notes: Recent release. Comprehensive look at live performance setup. Best for intermediate+ users familiar with patterns and effects.

title: Hyper FX Template - Punch In Effects
creator: EZBOT
description: EZBOT's Hyper FX template focusing on glitchy, lo-fi, and 'punch in' effects. Demo with musical examples.
notes: Great for learning effect design and creative manipulation. Shows sound design thinking.

title: How I Use The Octatrack For Techno At A Live Show
creator: EZBOT
description: EZBOT's real-world breakdown of using Octatrack for live techno performances, including template setup, scene transitions, and creative techniques.
notes: Excellent example of professional live setup. Shows how to structure a set for improvisation within constraints.

title: Octatrack MK2 - Live Resampling Tutorial Video
creator: Dataline
description: Dataline's deep dive into live resampling on Octatrack MK2. Shows setup, routing, and creative techniques for feeding audio back into the sampler.
notes: Advanced technique tutorial. Requires understanding of routing and Flex/Static machines. High-quality production.

title: Track & Teach: Octatrack Live Sampling & Remixing
creator: Dataline
description: Dataline's 13-minute guide to configuring the Octatrack for seamless live sampling and remixing. Covers Part settings, Fader Scenes, and audio routing.
notes: Community consensus: 'Better than anything on YouTube'. Focused, efficient teaching style. Highly recommended for live performers.

title: Octatrack Dynamic Sampling - Complete Course
creator: Thavius Beck
description: Thavius Beck's 3-hour+ professional course covering Octatrack structure, step sequencer, sampling, editing, timestretching, and slicing. Beginner to intermediate.
notes: Professional-quality structured course. Excellent for building solid foundations. Available on Ask.Video, macProVideo, Musicians Institute.

title: Octatrack MKII Advanced Sampling - Tutorial Course
creator: Thavius Beck
description: Thavius Beck's 19-tutorial advanced sampling course for Octatrack MK2. How to record, edit, slice, detect BPM, use step & live sequencing, and resample.
notes: Structured professional course (Ask.Video, macProVideo, Sound on Sound). Jump-in friendly, but builds complexity. Excellent production value.

title: Elektron Octatrack MKII's Sampling Tools Explained
creator: Ask.Audio
description: Ask.Audio's breakdown of Octatrack MK2's sampling and audio editing tools. Clear explanations of Audio Editor, slicing, and timestretching.
notes: Quick reference-style video. Good for understanding tool capabilities without deep dive.

title: Complete Musical Piece on Octatrack - Full Workflow
creator: Red Means Recording
description: Jeremy Blake (Red Means Recording) demonstrating how to build a complete, cohesive musical piece on the Octatrack from start to finish.
notes: Highly recommended for musical inspiration and workflow understanding. Shows how all pieces fit together in a real performance.

title: Octatrack Mastery with Jeremy Blake - Patchwerks Seattle
creator: Red Means Recording
description: Jeremy Blake introduces Octatrack at Patchwerks Seattle with intro from EZBOT. Overview of capabilities and creative workflow.
notes: Great overview of what makes Octatrack special. Good entry point before diving into technical tutorials.

title: Octatrack Tips & Tricks - Resource Collection
creator: Inspektor Gadjet
description: Inspektor Gadjet's collection of Octatrack tips, tricks, tutorials, and resources. Video tutorials and links curated for learning.
notes: Valuable reference site with curated video links and tips. Good for finding specific solutions and workflows.

title: Octatrack Masterclass - From Zero to Hero
creator: Elektronista
description: Comprehensive masterclass covering Octatrack basics from zero knowledge to building your first complete pattern.
notes: Recent, comprehensive beginner guide. Good alternative entry point with clear explanations.

title: Learning The Elektron Octatrack - Feature Article & Videos
creator: Synthtopia
description: Synthtopia's feature article and curated video tutorials for learning the Octatrack. Includes links to major tutorial creators.
notes: Good meta-resource: links to primary tutorial creators and explains learning path options.

title: Elektron Know-How Series - Octatrack Basics
creator: Elektron
description: Elektron's official Know-How video series covering Octatrack structure, audio pool, patterns, banks, scenes, machine selection, and more.
notes: Official source. Authoritative for accurate menu locations and official workflow. Complement with community tutorials for deeper understanding.

title: Free Octatrack Tutorials List + Live Setups & Performances
creator: Elektronauts Community
description: Community-curated megathread on Elektronauts listing free tutorials, live setups, performance examples, and learning resources.
notes: Excellent meta-resource created and maintained by community. Links to many creators and tutorials. Start here for breadth.

title: The Octatrack Tips & Tricks Thread
creator: MOD WIGGLER Community
description: Long-running MOD WIGGLER forum thread with Octatrack tips, tricks, user discoveries, and technical solutions from experienced users.
notes: Goldmine of user-generated tips and solutions. Great for troubleshooting and discovering creative techniques.
